name: engineering-system-kit
description: Full-stack engineering mindset, GitHub workflow, Supabase backend/auth, and system security plugin for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Engineering System Kit adds an engineer-first workflow for full-stack design, fixing, debugging, architecture, system flow, GitHub version control, Supabase backend/auth/security, authentication, authorization, application security, reliability, verification, and implementation discipline.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the engineer-first skill before changing the system. Inspect the codebase, protect Git history, check Supabase/auth/security boundaries, choose the right engineering lens, implement the smallest reliable change, and verify the result.
